title: Cinch's Missing Blocks
description: Cinch's Missing Blocks aims to add all the block variants that Mojang skipped. From random wall and stair variants that are missing to entire new brick sets.
body:
[![Partner](https://i.imgur.com/sf01XOZ.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=1088)

Cinch's Missing Blocks aims to add all the block variants that Mojang skipped. From random wall and stair variants that are missing to entire new brick sets. There are tons of new building blocks made from vanilla blocks. All these new blocks are fully fuctional with recipes and they match the mechanics of the other blocks from the vanilla block set they belong to.

Additions:

Note: All polished, brick, cracked brick, and mossy brick variants added come with slabs stairs and walls.

- Calcite block set with polished, bricks, cracked bricks, and mossy bricks variants as well as chiseled calcite bricks and calcite brick pillars. Normal calcite now has slabs, stairs, and walls too.
- Dripstone block set with polished, bricks, cracked bricks, and mossy bricks variants as well as chiseled dripstone bricks and dripstone brick pillars. Normal dripstone now has slabs, stairs, and walls too.
- Mossy and cracked variants of tuff bricks. If you enable the built in resource pack, chiseled tuff bricks become the tuff brick pillar.
- Andesite bricks, with cracked brick, and mossy brick variants as well as chiseled andesite bricks and andesite brick pillars. Also the missing polished andesite wall.
- Granite bricks, with cracked brick, and mossy brick variants as well as chiseled granite bricks and granite brick pillars. Also the missing polished granite wall.
- Diorite bricks, with cracked brick, and mossy brick variants as well as chiseled diorite bricks and diroite brick pillars. Also the missing polished diorite wall.
- Quartz bricks now have slabs, stairs, and walls as well as cracked and mossy variants. The missing quartz wall and smooth quartz wall are also added.
- Bricks now have cracked, mossy, and chiseled variants.
- Packed mud now has slabs, stairs, and walls.
- Mud Bricks now have cracked and mossy variants, as well as chiseled mud bricks and mud brick pillars.
- Polished endstone, cracked endstone bricks, as well as chiseled endstone bricks and endstone brick pillars. End stone also now has slabs, stairs, and walls.
- Mossy and cracked resin bricks.
- Stone walls. smooth stone stairs and walls, and stone pillars.
- Mossy cobbled deepslate, mossy deepslate bricks, mossy deepslate tiles, and deepslate brick pillars. Normal deepslate now has slabs, stairs, and walls. There are also polished deepslate buttons and pressure plates and a new sculk inlaid deepslate block. Deepslate recipes are also reworked.
- All vanilla cracked brick blocks now have slabs, stairs, and walls. This applies to: cracked stone bricks, cracked deepslate bricks, cracked polished blackstone bricks, and cracked nether bricks.
- Netherack now has slabs, stairs, and walls.
- Red nether bricks now have a cracked variant and a chiseled variant. The missing red nether brick fence is also added.
- Cracked prismarine bricks, mossy prismarine bricks, chiseled prismarine bricks, prismarine brick pillars, and the missing prismarine brick wall and dark prismarine wall.
- Smooth basalt now has slabs, stairs, and walls.
- Cut sandstone and cut red sandstone now have stair and wall variants. Smooth sandstone and smooth red sandstone now have wall variants. The vanilla sandstone and red sandstone walls now have the correct top texture.
- Snow bricks.
- Purpur now has walls and a chiseled variant.
- Built in texture pack that gives some slabs a custom double slab texture just like smooth stone slabs.
- Built in compatibility for Cinch's Villager Statues and Cinch's Lost Mob Grinders.

Thank you to Stallman, Popopi, and Myheadmess for all their texture work!

Feel free to use this mod in any modpack!
